$schema: Prospects feed v1 — committed weekly by Claude/cowork skill

prospects.summary: Public restaurant chain ($732M rev, 88 locations) with 2.1M loyalty members and no analytics layer. New CEO Feb 2026, new CMO Sept 2025, Hotjar confirmed.
prospects.overview: Portillo's (NASDAQ: PTLO) is an iconic Chicago-style fast-casual chain with 88 locations and $732M in annual revenue. Their Portillo's Perks loyalty program — launched March 2025 — has scaled to 2.1M members driving over 10% of system-wide sales, but there is no product analytics layer sitting on top of it.
whyNow: New CEO Brett Patterson started Feb 23, 2026 — 90-day audit window for digital/data stack review
CMO Denise Lauer (hired Sept 2025) owns Perks and will need behavioral analytics to prove program ROI
Perks is 1 year old with 2.1M members and >10% of sales — public company faces quarterly scrutiny on incremental frequency

signals.label: Exec Change
signals.detail: Brett Patterson joined as CEO Feb 23, 2026 — 90-day audit window for digital and data stack review is open now

signals.label: Exec Change
signals.detail: Denise Lauer joined as CMO Sept 2025 — directly owns Portillo's Perks, digital, loyalty analytics, and social

signals.label: Competitor
signals.detail: Hotjar confirmed in privacy policy — displacement play for Session Replay tied to Perks member IDs

tasks.title: LinkedIn DM to Denise Lauer (CMO)
tasks.detail: Lead with loyalty analytics gap: 'When the board asks whether Perks is driving incremental frequency — what's your answer today?' Under 3 sentences, no deck.

tasks.title: LinkedIn DM to Keith Correia (CIO)
tasks.detail: He built a personalization platform at Steak 'n Shake — reference the Olo integration angle: 'No re-instrumentation needed.'

tasks.title: Email to Brett Patterson (CEO)
tasks.detail: New CEO audit window. Subject: 'One data gap that typically bites restaurant brands in new markets.' 4 sentences, no attachment.

tasks.title: Check #alliances for Olo partner overlap
tasks.detail: Olo powers Portillo's ordering layer. Post in Slack: 'Anyone own the Olo partnership? Portillo's uses them.' Get the name before going cold.

prospects.summary: C2FO just launched in Nigeria and closed $30M. As the platform expands globally, product intelligence needs to keep pace.
prospects.overview: C2FO is a working capital marketplace connecting buyers and suppliers to accelerate cash flow through dynamic early payment programs. They've facilitated over $400B in working capital across 2M+ companies in 180+ countries, and recently launched CycleFlow in Nigeria and expanded into India via C2treds.
whyNow: CycleFlow launched in Nigeria — new market, narrow window to instrument before the next expansion
$30M IFC investment earmarked for platform acceleration — tooling decisions being made now
No confirmed product analytics tool — onboarding funnel visibility is blind across new markets

signals.label: Funding
signals.detail: $30M raised from IFC to accelerate global platform expansion across emerging markets

signals.label: Product Launch
signals.detail: CycleFlow launched in Nigeria — first phase of a continent-wide working capital strategy

signals.label: Expansion
signals.detail: 3 new market launches since 2024 (Nigeria, India via C2treds, Southeast Asia) — no behavioral analytics layer confirmed

tasks.title: Request warm intro via IFC network
tasks.detail: IFC is an Amplitude strategic partner. Ping #alliances: 'IFC just invested $30M in C2FO — can we get a warm intro through the IFC partnership?'

tasks.title: Email Anne Steinhaus (Chief Product & Technology Officer)
tasks.detail: Lead with Nigeria onboarding visibility gap. 'When CycleFlow launched in Nigeria, how fast did you know whether the onboarding flow was working for local SMEs?'

tasks.title: LinkedIn to Rahul Mann (VP Product Management)
tasks.detail: Champion angle: 'Your PMs are launching in new markets without behavioral analytics — Amplitude gives them self-serve answers without waiting on data.' Under 100 words.

tasks.title: Enroll in global expansion Outreach sequence
tasks.detail: Tag account with 'expansion signal' and '$30M raise'. Note IFC intro attempt in SFDC.

prospects.summary: Branch just hired a new CFO and launched an embedded digital wallet with Stripe. Two analytics directors on staff confirm budget — no confirmed product analytics tool.
prospects.overview: Branch is a workforce payments platform helping businesses pay hourly workers faster via earned wage access, instant pay, and an embedded digital wallet. 278 employees, headquartered in Minneapolis. Key verticals: hospitality, logistics, healthcare. Recently launched Branch Embedded (Sep 2025) — a white-label payments product for enterprise clients built on Stripe.
whyNow: New CFO hired Feb 2026 — fresh exec, tooling decisions being revisited
Stripe embedded wallet launched Mar 2026 — new product surface needs behavioral instrumentation
Branch Embedded live since Sep 2025 — 6 months in, time to measure feature adoption by vertical

signals.label: Exec Change
signals.detail: Matthew Peterson hired as CFO Feb 2026 (prev CFO at Snappy) — new exec brings fresh tooling review cycle

signals.label: Product Launch
signals.detail: Stripe embedded digital wallet partnership announced Mar 2026 — new payment product surface requires user behavior analytics

signals.label: Hiring
signals.detail: Engineering hiring at 12-month high as of Nov 2025 — building fast across platform, UX, and payments infra

tasks.title: Email Lies De Feyter (Director, Analytics & Insights)
tasks.detail: Sharpest champion. Lead with: 'You have two analytics directors and a new CFO — what does your product analytics stack look like today?'

tasks.title: LinkedIn to Zachary Fransen (VP, Data & Analytics)
tasks.detail: Second analytics leader. Angle: 'Branch Embedded just hit 6 months — how are you measuring adoption across hospitality and logistics verticals?'

tasks.title: LinkedIn to David Tran (Head of Product)
tasks.detail: Product angle: 'Payments UI is high-stakes — drop-off in wallet setup costs real revenue. How are you diagnosing friction today?'

tasks.title: Email Mitchell Coopet (CTO) on Session Replay
tasks.detail: Payments UI is high-stakes — drop-off in wallet setup costs real revenue. Reference Branch Embedded as the use case.
